tasks.subject: Task 1: bridge SSH 별칭 맵 (sshHosts.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ssh-hosts.json 로드 + SshTarget host가 별칭이면 치환하는 순수 모듈. Files: bridge/src/sshHosts.ts (+test). Verify: cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/sshHosts.test.js.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/sshHosts.ts", "bridge/src/sshHosts.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/sshHosts.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid load returns entry", "missing/undefined path empty no throw", "applySshAlias resolves bare alias", "note user/port preserved", "non-alias untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: server.ts 별칭 해석 + 터널 끊김 친절 에러
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 부팅 시 BRIDGE_SSH_HOSTS_FILE 로드, connect에서 applySshAlias 해석, 별칭 도달불가 시 한국어 에러. Files: bridge/src/server.ts. Verify: cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tsc+full test pass no regression", "ssh://phone -> localhost:18022", "tunnel-down friendly error", "non-alias unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Quadlet 마운트 + ssh-hosts.json 예시
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ssh-hosts.json RO 마운트 + BRIDGE_SSH_HOSTS_FILE env + 셋업 주석. Files: bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container. Verify: grep -n 'ssh-hosts' bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'ssh-hosts' bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RO volume + env present", "header example present", "missing-file disabled noted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 폰+RPi 역터널 1회 셋업 + ssh://phone 접속 검증 (런북)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 폰 sshd+키+autossh + RPi tunnel 유저 + bridge ssh-hosts.json으로 ssh://phone 셸 진입 1회 수동 성공. Files: device/server config. Verify: ssh -p 18022 termux@localhost 'getprop ro.product.model'.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ssh -p 18022 termux@localhost 'getprop ro.product.model'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RPi ss 18022 LISTEN", "ssh -p 18022 termux@localhost shell keyauth", "ssh://phone note opens shell"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Magisk service.d 부팅 자동 기동 + 재부팅 E2E
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** 폰 재부팅 후 무개입으로 sshd+autossh 자동 기동 → ssh://phone 동작. Files: /data/adb/service.d/tomboy-tunnel.sh. Verify: 폰 reboot → RPi ssh -p 18022 termux@localhost 'echo reboot-ok' → reboot-ok.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ssh -p 18022 termux@localhost 'echo reboot-ok'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service.d script exists +755", "after reboot unattended ss 18022 LISTEN", "after reboot ssh://phone opens shell"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "this task only", "subagentBrief": "Reboot phone via adb, wait for unlock, confirm tunnel auto-reestablished and reboot-ok with no manual step."}
```
